title: School estate management standards
body: "These documents are useful if you have responsibility for overseeing or managing the school estate. This includes:   proprietors, leaders and governors of schools charity trustees of academies and academy trusts trustees of schools school business professionals those with responsibility for the day-to-day running of the school estate local authorities diocesan authorities and other religious authorities and bodies   They will allow schools to:   understand the principles from baseline to advanced clarify what ‘effective’ means in practice identify gaps plan and prioritise their own journey  "
